user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my advance expense requests in a list with added date, title, expenses, requested advance and status, so that I can track my advance requests at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Advance Expenses screen; When the page loads; Then my advance expenses are listed with Added date, Title, Expenses, Requested advance (₹), Status and Task columns

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my advance expenses by a From and To period, so that I can review advances raised within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Advance Expenses screen; When I set a From and To date and click Search; Then only advance expenses within that period are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my advance expenses by status such as Pending Approval, Rejected, Cancelled or Approved, so that I can focus on requests in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Advance Expenses screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only advance expenses with that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all advance expenses again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is restored

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the advance expenses list, so that I can see the latest status of my requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Advance Expenses screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list is reloaded with current data
